goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'ely' and should leave on 'monday'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 13:15'.
Make sure you get 'price', 'arrival time', and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
